summary: Tightened qd audit report validation so verificationEvidence.diffReviewed, verificationEvidence.completionReportReviewed, and verificationEvidence.verificationEvidenceReviewed must be present as booleans.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects audit reports missing boolean verificationEvidence.diffReviewed, completionReportReviewed, or verificationEvidenceReviewed.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh now validates all three qd-compatible audit verificationEvidence fields as booleans; evidence/m4-qd-audit-schema-contract/commands.log records a temporary-copy negative smoke test failing on a non-boolean diffReviewed value.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing audit reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-audit-schema-contract/commands.log records `bash scripts/qd-reports-check.sh` and `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check` passing with 73 existing completion reports and 73 existing audit reports before this node's reports were added.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd report checking and shared check passing.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-audit-schema-contract/commands.log records `bash scripts/qd-reports-check.sh`, `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check`, and `nix develop -c just check` passing on Linux.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false because this change only updates repository qd report schema validation.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy audit schema negative smoke test

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd audit-report schema validation only; Linux command validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
